problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
